Severe And Prolonged Heatwave Expected Across India This May, Says Acharya Avinod Kumar.
Mumbai, Maharashtra, 2nd of May 2026 : As the month of May approaches, the intensity of heat is already becoming alarming in several parts of the country. Scorching sunlight, hot winds, and rising temperatures are set to make life difficult for people. This time, the heat is expected to be not only intense but also prolonged, potentially having a deeper impact on daily life.
According to Acharya Avinod Kumar, the early and mid-weeks of May will be the most challenging. During this period, dry heatwave winds and strong solar radiation may leave people distressed. Stepping out during the afternoon could become particularly difficult, with temperatures remaining high for extended periods in many regions.
However, there is a slight hope for relief. In the last week of May, weather conditions may begin to shift. Partial cloud cover and the onset of pre-monsoon activities in some areas could bring temporary respite.
As for the monsoon, signs indicate that steady rainfall may gradually begin between early to mid-June. Overall, relief from the heat is expected to come in phases rather than suddenly, making it essential for people to stay cautious and take necessary precautions.
